Customer-centered professional with 14 years of experience leading international expansion, business model transformation and execution of strategic initiatives.

Expertise in designing and leading market entry strategies, joint ventures and the transformation of business models through strategic initiatives (products, regulation, operations, IT) aligned with short and long-term business objectives.

Expert in strategy execution monitoring and governance through performance frameworks (risks, budget, timeline, KPIs, OKRs), ensuring clear communication and alignment with stakeholders on business outcomes.

Extensive experience working with C-level executives and external stakeholders (vendors, regulators, strategic partners, competitors) while effectively influencing decisions, advocating in senior forums, and solving program-level challenges.

Proven leadership of multidisciplinary teams (IT, Operations, Business, Compliance, etc.) and experience managing multicultural projects across markets such as Mexico, UK, LAC, Spain, US.

Designing scalable strategies to generate sustained impact — across markets & industries.
